Uranus Pinnacle
properties.description: Pinnacle at 8 meters depth, open exposed sea, negative drop recommended. High turbidity, low visibility.

properties.name: Jevry's Shaft
properties.description: Many many fish, oil rig. Open and may be prone to currents. Structures at bottom.

properties.name: Fananas
properties.description: Swim south-east with reef on the left.

properties.name: JC Slope
properties.description: Swim south-east, reef on the left. Not much to see, bad below 10 meters.

properties.name: Valley of the tubes
properties.description: A lot of tube corals going west. Not too good in terms of human damage and silt. Recommend exploring to the east instead. Nice corals at 5 meters depth.

properties.name: Tuna Can
properties.description: 10 and 20 meters swim east, observed a large school of tuna here. Best at 10 meters depth.

properties.name: Jevry's Drop
properties.description: Jevry and team went reef on right south-west.

properties.name: Leon's Cloudy Canyon
properties.description: Team Leon dropped, drifted west and crossed the valley at 25 meters depth. A lot of human construction damage, but a nice dive nonetheless. Ended up north-west at the outlet of the stream. Bad visibility at bottom, strong current.

properties.name: The Cleavage
properties.description: Three possible directions, west, south and south-east. South provides a shallow garden of corals that may get impacted by tide. South-east has bigger corals and more sandy bottom at 30 meters. Ending the dive south-west of the island.

properties.name: Jetski Lagoon
properties.description: Not any good

properties.name: Kaliage Kecil Selatan
properties.description: Drift south-west, rich corals, red anemone, good bio diversity

properties.name: Kaliage Kecil Utara
properties.description: Good conservation site in the middle, corals are good, and rich. Site may have strong currents in between tides. High turbidity in the deepest part of the valley.

properties.name: Kayuangin Lagoon
properties.description: Not any good

properties.name: Leon's Bikini Bottom
properties.description: Mini pinnacles, deep dive, going south-east

properties.name: Maria's Heart
properties.description: Rich hard corals, and heart shaped sponges. Some silt.

properties.name: Noodles
properties.description: Drift west, Rich Coral, Channels, Jellyfish

properties.name: Sea Garden
properties.description: Conservation Swimthroughs, Fishlife, Softcorals

properties.name: Spongebob
properties.description: Huge Seafans, open water depth limit

properties.name: Manta Bay
properties.description: One of two Manta Bay divesites. Listen to experienced boat captains, these sites have the potential for very strong surges. Do not go too close to the cliffs where the waves break. Only thing here to see is the numerous mantarays usually feeding.

properties.name: Blue Lagoon
properties.description: Simple divesite, but still can have strong currents. In general bad visibility, OK for beginners. Some underwater statues can be found.

properties.name: Gili Tepekong North
properties.description: Dive towards north, some huge boulders to swim among, and open plains of corals.

properties.name: Gili Tepekong South
properties.description: Dive towards south, a big tunnel and walls.

properties.name: Crystal Bay
properties.description: Also called Penida Bay by some, this divesite condition depends on currents, and may have strong downcurrent. Potential place for Mola-mola.

properties.name: Ped
properties.description: Ped, or also known as Peed. A site that can be calm when there is no current, good for photography. Dive as a drift dive in any case, with pickup in another location. A wall goes from around 20 meters and down, but a gentle reef from 0 to 20 meters.
